features.name: GitHub Pages Setup

features.name: Deploy Storybook

features.name: Add Modal Component
features.description: Modal/Dialog with overlay, close button, sizes, header/body/footer sections
features.note: Enhanced existing Modal with sizes (sm, md, lg, fullscreen), ModalHeader, ModalBody, ModalFooter components, fade/scale animations

features.name: Add Dropdown/Select
features.description: Enhanced dropdown with search, multi-select, option groups, keyboard navigation
features.note: New Select component (exported as Dropdown) with searchable, multiple, groups, custom rendering support

features.name: Add Tabs Component
features.description: Tabs with variants (underline, boxed, pills), controlled/uncontrolled, icons, lazy panels
features.note: Full Tabs component with all variants, keyboard navigation, vertical orientation support

features.name: Add Card Component
features.description: Card with header, body, footer, image support, variants
features.note: Card with CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter, CardImage. Variants: elevated, outlined, flat. Clickable option.

features.name: Add Badge/Tag
features.description: Badge with variants (solid, outline, subtle), colors, dismissible tags
features.note: Badge component with dot variant, Tag component with dismiss and icon support

features.name: Add Avatar
features.description: Avatar with image, fallback initials, sizes, status, groups
features.note: Avatar with 5 sizes, status indicators, auto-initials from name. AvatarGroup with max/overflow.

features.name: Add Tooltip
features.description: Tooltip with positions, triggers (hover/click/focus), dark/light variants
features.note: Full Tooltip with arrow, delay options, controlled mode support

features.name: Add Alert/Banner
features.description: Alert with variants (info, success, warning, error), dismissible, actions
features.note: Alert with auto-icons, title+description, action slot, banner mode

features.name: Add Skeleton Loaders
features.description: Skeleton with text, avatar, card, table row variants
features.note: Enhanced base Skeleton plus SkeletonText, SkeletonAvatar, SkeletonCard, SkeletonTableRow variants

features.name: CLAUDE.md AI Docs
features.description: AI-friendly documentation with component inventory, props, examples
features.note: Created comprehensive CLAUDE.md with all 22 components documented, props tables, code examples, design tokens, and common patterns

features.name: Version Bump + Publish Ready
